title: PlanStepFailedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `plan_step_failed` event — step reached terminal failure. See spec/plan-lifecycle-v1.md §5.4.

ordinal.description: Zero-based position of the step within its plan.

error.description: Error message from the failing step. Consumers MUST NOT parse it semantically.

task_id.description: Delegation task id; present iff this step was delegated (§3.7).

goal_id.description: Owning goal when the plan serves a goal.
